abstract: To participate you must enroll here https://www.ibm.com/events/reg/flow/ibm/FHB3R6MB/landing/page/landing Agenda 11:30 AM - 12:00 PM Registration & Welcome 12:00 PM - 12:30 PM Lab Setup & Lunch 12:30 PM - 3:00 PM Hands-on Lab 1: Spec Coding with Cassandra Hands-on Lab 2: Build Agentic AI Application with Langflow and Astra DB 3:00 PM - 3:15 PM Wrap Up
